hypothesis: A synchronized US-index opening move may require a causal trailing exit rather than the fixed targets already falsified by the breadth and impulse screens.

engine_contract.timestamp_basis: Darwinex broker wall GMT+2/+3 converted to UTC, then America/New_York
engine_contract.signal: Mean ATR-normalized move of NDX, SP500, and WS30 over completed opening bars, with the declared sign-agreement floor.
engine_contract.entry: Equal-risk three-index package at the next M15 open in the breadth direction.
engine_contract.initial_stop: Independent fixed ATR stop per leg.
engine_contract.trailing_stop: After each completed bar, move the next bar's stop to the most favorable prior L-bar extreme minus/plus the fixed ATR trail distance; never loosen it.
engine_contract.intrabar_rule: Test the stop active before each M15 bar first; a stop updated from that bar cannot trigger until the next bar.
engine_contract.exit: Active trailing stop or fixed maximum M15 hold, with no overnight position.

selection_contract.winner_rule: Maximize min(development PF, validation PF), then development trades.
selection_contract.holdout_open_rule: Open 2024-2025 only for the single global preholdout winner.
selection_contract.holdout_pass_rule: At least 70 trades, pooled PF >= 1.10, positive pooled net R, and positive net R in both 2024 and 2025.

label: RESEARCH_ONLY_NO_GO
